_doc: FLUX.1-dev txt2img (ComfyUI API format) for cb-imagegen using the ALL-IN-ONE fp8 checkpoint via CheckpointLoaderSimple (MODEL+CLIP+VAE from ONE node — no split-file mismatch). content-studio sends {"input":{"workflow": <this>}} with {prompt}/{width}/{height}/{seed} substituted. The face-lock variant adds a PuLID Apply node fed by the client's face image.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, deformed
